sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 key expansion producing all eleven round keys in reverse packed order for decryption use.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_round: Combinational AES inverse middle round implementing InvShiftRows, InvSubBytes, AddRoundKey, and InvMixColumns.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_final_round: Combinational AES inverse final round implementing InvShiftRows, InvSubBytes, and AddRoundKey without InvMixColumns.
